name: Cystech Electronics Corp.
summary: Cystech Electronics Corp. designs, develops, manufactures, and supplies power devices for the computing, consumer electronics, communication, and industrial markets worldwide. The company offers MOSFET and SCR products, bipolar and digital transistors, and AECQ transistors. It also provides universal high brightness LED drivers; PWM integrated circuits (IC); DC to DC ICs; and dual operational amplifier and voltage references, regulators, CMos regulators, and quadruple operational comparators. In addition, the company offers switching control, fast, zener, switching, and schottky diodes; general purpose, glass passivated, snubber damping, and high efficiency rectifiers; and bridge and TVS products. Cystech Electronics Corp. is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
